title: mirabilis nyctaginea var. angustifolia
intro: Mirabilis nyctaginea var. angustifolia, commonly known as narrow-leaved four o'clock, is a perennial plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting bacterial infections, and soothing skin irritations. Narrow-leaved four o'clock can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable addition to natural medicine cabinets.
